arts.ttl: Mourinho confident Man City will be STRIPPED of his Premier League title
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho is confident that Manchester City will be stripped of the 2017-18 Premier League trophy, with the title handed to the Special One’s Man Utd side of that season instead. But Mourinho is confident that his Man Utd side from that season could yet be upgraded to champions if Man City are found guilty and punished in their current trial.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho jokes his Manchester United could still win the Premier League amid Man City 115 charges
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho took Man United the closest to Manchester City in 2017-18 and is still holding out hope he could get a winner's medal.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho fires shot at Man City during box-office press conference by insisting Man United will have to 'pay him a bonus and give him a medal' if former rivals are stripped of 2018 title
arts.sum: Mourinho joked he still hasn't given up pocketing a bonus from for winning the Premier League title if Man City are docked points for breaking financial rules.

arts.ttl: I riled John Stones so much he refused to swap shirts – I want to play him every week
arts.sum: Football League veteran Tom Pope got under John Stones' skin a few years back, and he has opened up about how the Manchester City defender reacted when they shared a pitch

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho claims his Manchester United team could still win title ‘if Premier League punish Man City’
arts.sum: City, who deny all charges, are facing a hearing into over 100 alleged breaches of the Premier League’s financial rules dating back to when Mourinho was in charge of United

arts.ttl: 'John Stones swore at me and refused shirt swap – I had him riled during Man City game'
arts.sum: A Football League veteran claims he once riled John Stones up to the point where the Manchester City defender lost his cool and told him to f*** off after a game

arts.ttl: The heir to Mo Salah, a teenager trained by Erling Haaland's old mentor - and a potential Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement: The RB Leipzig stars who could be auditioning for a Liverpool move tonight
arts.sum: The Reds have had an affinity for Red Bull-reared stars in recent seasons - Sadio Mane, Ibrahima Konate, Naby Keita, Taki Minamino, and Dominik Szoboszlai have all walked the caffeinated path.

arts.ttl: Guardiola on England, Tuchel and nine years at Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has opened up about how exploring other cultures has shaped him as a person and as a manager - and why Thomas Tuchel can finally end England's long wait for World Cup glory.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne prefers MLS over Saudi Arabia move with San Diego FC hopeful
arts.sum: Sacha Tavolieri has revealed that, should Kevin De Bruyne leave Manchester City, he would prefer to cross the Atlantic to join the MLS than end up in the Saudi Pro…

arts.ttl: Man City fans stage protest outside Premier League headquarters
arts.sum: The protest came hours after a significant meeting between Premier League clubs
